title: Global limits of hydrological state monitoring under streamflow persistence
description: Derived source data and source-data-level code for the paper 'Global limits of hydrological state monitoring under streamflow persistence'. Version 1.1.0 adds Figure 5 source-data workbooks, retained-basin metadata, transition-gain model tables, Q-only surrogate draw and summary tables, and Figure 5 transition/surrogate analysis scripts. Raw provider records are not redistributed.
